name: Dried Apple Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook dried apples in 4 cups water until tender. Drain and save juice.
2. Measure 2 cups juice, adding water if needed.
3. Mix 1/4 cup sugar with Dry Baking Mix; stir in Sourdough Starter to moisten flour.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface, knead lightly, and pat or roll to a 12X18 inch rectangle.
5. Sprinkle with apples. Roll, starting at the short end; cut into 12 slices.
6. Put remaining sugar, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, butter, and the 2 cups apple liquid into a large deep skillet.
7. Bring to a boil.
8. Gently lower apple slices into hot syrup.
9. Bake in a 375°F oven for 35-40 minutes.
